data.name: Futanari Sex Adventures - Episode 6
data.detailed_description:
This adult visual novel series features a stunning red-haired futanari as the protagonist. In this episode, Kira and her girlfriend seek help from a sex therapist.


GAME DESCRIPTION

After struggling with intimacy issues, Kira and Evelyn decide to seek professional help. 

Following a thorough consultation, the doctor finds nothing physically wrong with Evelyn. 

However, her difficulty achieving satisfaction suggests a deeper issue- one that may require a more unconventional approach.

Eager for a solution, the couple agrees to try the doctor’s unique methods.

As things intensify, Kira begins to wonder: is she ready to leave her girlfriend alone in the room with the attractive doctor? And what will happen when the doctor discovers Kira’s own unusual traits?

Play our game to find out!

FEATURES

- HD renders

- Image gallery

data.short_description: This adult visual novel series features a stunning red-haired futanari as the protagonist. In this episode, Kira and her girlfriend seek help from a sex therapist.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
